calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-13-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: E. Bura/S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Petitioner: Abishag Toran AKA Vavi Avishag Toran, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appeared to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition were true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court granted the petition for Change of Name to: Avishag Toran.
Decree signed in open court.
